upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avarujya yayO gulmAnpaTastasya samIpajAn' (BA0 Adi0 1513) avarujya=avaBajya=nIcErBagnAn kftvA
'idaM hiraRyamARqaM vyarujan' (Sa0 brA0 11162) vyarujan aBaYjan viriha viSezakfnna
'Arujan virujan pArTo jyAM vikarzaSca pARinA' (BA0 droRa0 12731) viriha viSezakfnna virujan viDyan
'virugRodagraDArAgraH kuliSo mama vakzasi' (Bawwi0 525) virugRAni avasannAni kuRWitAni udagrARi mahAnti DArAgrARi yasya saH
'ArujanvirujanpArTo jyAM vikarzaSca pARinA' (BA0 droRa0 12731) Arujan kfntan
